message:
fix(moderation): harden appeal flow, incident validation, and enforcement logic

Appeals pages (appeals/page.tsx, suspended/page.tsx):
- Encode actionId and userId in appeal URLs with encodeURIComponent to
  prevent malformed query strings when IDs contain special characters.

Appeal form (appeal-form.tsx):
- Guard against JSON parse failures on error responses by catching
  response.json() errors and returning null.
- Add explicit handling for null/invalid server responses with a clear
  user-facing error message.

Appeal store (appeal-store.ts):
- Accept optional actionCreatedAt in createAppeal and enforce the
  submission window server-side, closing a bypass where clients could
  skip the canAppealAction check.

Enforcement (enforcement.ts, enforcement.test.ts):
- getSuspensionInfo now returns null for "warning" status, since
  warnings are informational and should not be treated as suspensions.
- Updated test to assert null return for warned users instead of a
  non-suspended info object.

Admin incidents route (route.ts):
- Move input validation (impact level, status) before any mutations so
  that an invalid status no longer partially applies a valid impact
  update. Validation-then-mutation ordering prevents inconsistent state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
